html:
Exclusive to:

The Sea Lab is a craftable Structure in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 4 Limestone, 2 Sand and 2 Electrical Doodads to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. It works similar to an Alchemy Engine which means it can be used to unlock Crafting recipes of the science 2 tier, but it can only be placed on the Ocean.

Trivia

  • The Sea Lab was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
Craftable ItemsStructures

Exclusive to:
Sea Lab
"Unlock crafting recipes... at sea!"
Crafting
×4 ×2 ×2
Tab
Tier
Miscellaneous
"researchlab5"
“For sea science!”
–Wilson
“Can things burn at sea?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will learn many splishy splashy things!”
–Wolfgang
“Do I dare plumb the sea's dark knowledge?”
–Wendy
“NO KIN OF MINE WOULD STAND IN THAT HIDEOUS MOISTURE”
–WX-78
“A dedicated scholar can study anywhere.”
–Wickerbottom
“Doesn't seem like the best place, but here I am.”
–Woodie
“There are watery mysteries to be unlocked yet.”
–Maxwell
“Science on the sea! How marvelous!”
–Wagstaff
“Aegir, bless me with thy wisdöm!”
–Wigfrid
“We keep dropping our tools in the water by accident.”
–Webber
“In the middle of the ocean and I still have to do stuff!”
–Walani
“Couldn't hurt to hit the books now and then.”
–Warly
“Thet b'fer tinkerin' on th'waves!”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA AM HATH BIG-ETH BRAIN”
–Wilba
“Makes water things”
–Wormwood
“Am I sure that bamboo will keep it out of the water?”
–Wheeler
The Sea Lab is a craftable Structure in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 4 Limestone, 2 Sand and 2 Electrical Doodads to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. It works similar to an Alchemy Engine which means it can be used to unlock Crafting recipes of the science 2 tier, but it can only be placed on the Ocean.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Sea Lab was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Phòng thí nghiệm Biển là một Công trình có thể chế tạo được trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó cần 4 Đá vôi, 2 Cát và 2 Doodad Điện để chế tạo và Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó hoạt động tương tự như Máy luyện kim, nghĩa là nó có thể được sử dụng để mở khóa các công thức Chế tạo khoa học cấp 2, nhưng nó chỉ có thể được đặt trên Đại dương.

The '''Sea Lab''' is a craftable [[Structure]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It requires 4 [[Limestone]], 2 [[Sand]] and 2 [[Electrical Doodad]]s to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It works similar to an [[Alchemy Engine]] which means it can be used to unlock [[Crafting]] recipes of the science 2 tier, but it can only be placed on the [[Ocean]].

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Sea Lab was added to the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.{{clear}}
